===Be the Best! Pokémon B+W===
[[File:Bianca PBW.png|thumb|180px|Bianca in Be the Best! Pokémon B+W]]
Bianca is a friend of both [[Monta]] and [[Cheren]]. Although not much is known about her, she is not as knowledgeable as Cheren. Her first partner Pokémon was {{p|Oshawott}} at a type disadvantage to Monta's {{p|Snivy}}. She first appeared with Cheren, and after Cheren's lecture telling Monta his is inexperienced, Bianca says he said too much. She then watches Monta and Cheren battle the Biker King.
